zh.Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England: 英國格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆
zh.Thorpe Salvin, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾索普 薩爾文
zh.lifeSummary: 當John de Sandford II於大約1430年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親John de Sandford I31歲，母親Julianna de Corbet27歲。他和Margaret Musgrave至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1470年享年42歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John de Sandford II于大约1430年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲John de Sandford I31岁，母亲Julianna de Corbet27岁。他和Margaret Musgrave至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1470年享年42岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sandford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John de Sandford II was born about 1430, in Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Sandford I, was 31 and his mother, Julianna de Corbet, was 27. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Margaret Musgrave. He died about 1470, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John de Sandford II est né environ 1430, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Sandford I, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Julianna de Corbet, avait 27 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Margaret Musgrave. Il est décédé environ 1470, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John de Sandford II um 1430 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Sandford I 31 und seine Mutter Julianna de Corbet 27. Er hatte mit Margaret Musgrave mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1470 im Alter von 42 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John de Sandford II è nato il circa 1430 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John de Sandford I, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Julianna de Corbet, aveva 27 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Margaret Musgrave. Morì circa 1470, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John de Sandford IIが約1430年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父John de Sandford Iは31歳，母Julianna de Corbetは27歳であった。彼はMargaret Musgraveとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1470年に42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John de Sandford II(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Sandford I(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Julianna de Corbet(은)는 27세였다. 그는 Margaret Musgrave(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1470년 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.about 1430–about 1470: tany ho any amin'ny 1430–tany ho any amin'ny 1470

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John de Sandford II nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Sandford I, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Julianna de Corbet, tinha 27 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Margaret Musgrave. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1470, com 42 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John de Sandford II родился около 1430 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Sandford I было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Julianna de Corbet, 27. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Margaret Musgrave. Он умер около 1470 г. в возрасте 42 лет.

sm.about 1430–about 1470: e tusa o le 1430–e tusa o le 1470

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John de Sandford II nació aproximadamente 1430, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Sandford I, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Julianna de Corbet, tenía 27 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Margaret Musgrave. Murió aproximadamente 1470, a la edad de 42 años.
